courses.title: Piano
courses.description: Covers acoustic and electric piano tones used for emotional melodies, chord progressions, and expressive harmonic structures in AI-generated music.

courses.title: Mallet / Percussion
courses.description: Includes instruments like xylophone, vibraphone, and bells that add bright textures, rhythmic sparkle, and cinematic accents to generated compositions.

courses.title: Organ
courses.description: Useful for creating warm sustained harmonies, gospel-like tones, ambient layers, and vintage keyboard textures in music generation.

courses.title: Guitar
courses.description: Explore acoustic and electric guitar-driven sounds for rhythm, melody, strumming patterns, and expressive lead sections in AI music output.

courses.title: Bass
courses.description: Provides low-end groove, rhythmic foundation, and tonal depth that help generated tracks feel fuller, more balanced, and musically grounded.

courses.title: Strings
courses.description: Ideal for emotional layers, orchestral depth, cinematic swells, and expressive harmonies that make generated music feel rich and dramatic.

courses.title: Ensemble / Choir
courses.description: Adds vocal pads, layered textures, and lush ensemble harmonies that help create atmospheric and cinematic AI-generated soundscapes.

courses.title: Brass
courses.description: Includes trumpets, trombones, and horn-style sounds useful for bold sections, orchestral power, and energetic musical highlights.

courses.title: Reed
courses.description: Covers saxophone, clarinet, and related reed instruments that add soulful expression, jazzy movement, and smooth melodic character.

courses.title: Pipe
courses.description: Includes flute and pipe-like sounds that work well for airy melodies, folk-inspired passages, and soft cinematic phrasing.

courses.title: Synth Lead
courses.description: Best for catchy hooks, electronic solos, futuristic melodies, and standout lead lines in modern AI-generated music.

courses.title: Synth Pad
courses.description: Creates smooth ambient layers, dreamy textures, and background harmonic support that make electronic tracks feel spacious and immersive.

courses.title: Synth FX
courses.description: Used for futuristic sound design, transitions, digital textures, and unique sonic effects that enhance generated music creatively.

courses.title: Ethnic
courses.description: Represents culturally inspired instruments and world textures that bring diversity, uniqueness, and regional flavor to generated tracks.

courses.title: Percussive
courses.description: Focused on non-drum rhythm elements that add groove, movement, punch, and dynamic rhythmic support across musical styles.

courses.title: SFX
courses.description: Special effect sounds used to create atmosphere, transitions, cinematic moments, and experimental textures in AI music generation.
